entry.subtopic: Immediate Clarification of the Contextual Error
entry.reasoning:
Please be precise, concise, and grounded in primary source analysis and historical methodology.

## Part 3 — Synthesis
Provide: integrated analysis of how the "Immediate Clarification of the Contextual Error" reveals fundamental tensions in pre-Kantian rationalism and empiricism, and why this matters for understanding the trajectory of early modern philosophy.
